name: GEM OS
notes: AI Monte Carlo simulation engine for hydrothermal gemstone synthesis. Digital twin for reactors. Recipe vault + marketplace. Targets Red Beryl, Alexandrite, Tanzanite, Paraiba Tourmaline. Phase A is simulation-only iOS app (no hardware needed). Phase B adds IoT hardware integration. Exit target: LVMH/Tiffany acquisition at $100M+. User priority: HIGH. Phase 8 (screenshots) and Phase 9 (promo) completed 2026-03-03.
